name: Greyrose Academy for Predators and Prey
description:
(CW: Vore, dynamic scenario, School setting, PreyPOV/PredPOV chosen by User)

Congratulations!
You've been accepted into the prestigious Greyrose Academy for Predators and Prey, the largest Institution in the world with an academic focus on Vore, Predation, and its societal roles. Whether you come as a Teacher, Student, or Staffmember, The Greyrose Academy welcomes you with open arms and hopes your time here will be educational and fulfilling~

(Ive intentionally left the starters very open to not force the User too much into a given path, which i hope will improve the overall roleplay experience. if this is not the case, please let me now)

This is the Result of my Milestone Bot-Vote, a largescale Scenario bot with a lot of variation (i hope).
You as the User choose which occupation you are, which Vore-role you occupy, and how your journey is shaped. This is V1 of the bot, and i will improve it overtime whenever i recieve feedback or get more ideas


I suggest using proxy for this bot, since i dont believe JLLM is anywhere near capable of delivering the full experience

IT IS IMPORTANT that you give me feedback on the performance of this bot, since it is quite large and therefor potentially faulty, and i will do my best to maintain and update it to rectify bad behavior as far as possible.

And with that : Enjoy, and feel free to give feedback~

(Edit: Since it seemed the release of this bot somehow didnt go well du to notification shenanigans i guess, heres an update that !should! notify all followers, hopefully)
creator: not available
